title: Suspense
description: Fallbacks for async UI without loading spaghetti.

options: Any promise thrown by a component / use()
questions.explanation: Show fallback UI until the promise resolves.
Fallback renders while any child suspends.

options: Reads a promise's value in a Suspense-friendly way
questions.explanation: Suspends until resolved; renders when the value is ready.

options: Streaming SSR, lazy(), and data libraries that support it
questions.explanation: The whole pipeline (server + client) uses Suspense for progressive UI.
